calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Giselle Casey. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Dan Scanlan, principal, appearing on behalf of AutoReturn.
Rene Peinado appearing on behalf of Seven Hills Development.

This matter comes on calendar for Mr. Peinado's Motion to Vacate Judgment. After hearing argument from both sides, the court takes this matter under submission.

11/21/08 - ORDER ON APPEAL DENYING APPELLANTS' MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Set For Trial On Aug-06-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Continued To Aug-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-08-2008 Continued To Nov-20-08 At 04:00 P.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Dan Scanlan, company principal, appearing In Propria Person for the plaintiff AutoReturn.
Rene Peinado, general manager, appearing In Propria Person for himself and the defendant Seven Hills Development LLC.

This matter comes on calendar for a Trial De Novo. Both parties are affirmed and give testimony. The court reviews the original trial exhibits.

Mr. Peinado provides the court with a copy of a settlement agreement that is contingent upon the outcome of a related criminal matter. However, neither party has any paperwork regarding its outcome.

Mr. Peinado must contact the Department 611 clerk with the case number of the criminal matter. The court will await this information before taking this matter under submission.

8/8/08 - The court has decided to continue this matter to November 20, 2008 at 4:00 p.m. in Department 611.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Judgment Entered
